home.heroDesc: A local development template designed to help you build dApps on the Stellar network. This environment lets you easily test wallet connections, smart contract interactions, transaction verifications, etc.
home.headline1: Learning is the proof of work.
home.subtitle: Earn on-chain credentials by completing courses. Get funded by a DAO that believes in your potential.
home.sprintDesc: LearnVault is built in the open. Pick an issue, ship a feature, and earn your place in the contributor list.
home.yourProgressDesc: Track your enrolled courses and milestone completions.

courseProgress.title: Course Progress (Testing Issue 55)
courseProgress.desc: Track your learning journey and earn LRN rewards by completing on-chain milestones.

sampleContracts.title: Sample Contracts
sampleContracts.guessDesc1: Interact with the sample contract from the
sampleContracts.guessDesc2: using an automatically generated contract client.
sampleContracts.other: Or take a look at other sample contracts to get you started:

startBuilding.step2: Contracts are built by LearnVault when you run

features.scholarNftsDesc: Your hard-earned expertise, permanently immortalized as verifiable credentials on the Stellar network.
features.automatedFundingDesc: Decentralized treasury disbursements triggered instantly upon milestone completion via Soroban contracts.
features.communityDaoDesc: A protocol governed by the scholars who use it. Vote on curriculum, treasury, and reputation standards.

connect.fundErrorRetry: Error funding account. Please try again.
connect.networkConnect: Connect your wallet using this network.
connect.networkMismatch: Wallet is on {{wallet}}, connect to {{app}} instead.
connect.connectDesc: LearnVault needs a connected Stellar wallet before you can access this section.

network.testnetWarning: You are on Stellar Testnet — tokens have no real value
network.futurenetWarning: You are on Stellar Futurenet — experimental network for testing
network.localWarning: You are on Local Network — for development only

usdc.tooltip: Get {{amount}} test USDC tokens for testing donations and treasury operations

dao.title: DAO
dao.governanceDesc: Browse live proposals, vote with your governance tokens, and shape the future of LearnVault.
dao.connectToVote: Connect wallet to create proposals and vote.
dao.delegateDesc: Delegate your voting power to a trusted address. You can reclaim it at any time.
dao.delegateeRequired: Enter the Stellar address of your delegatee.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.desc: Top learners ranked by LRN token balance. Earn your place.
leaderboard.noResults: No learners found matching your search.
leaderboard.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to see your rank.
leaderboard.noScholarsDesc: No scholars have earned LRN tokens yet. Be the first to complete a course!

profile.title: My Profile
profile.desc: This is the My Profile page.
profile.linkedWalletsDesc: Stellar keys tied to this profile. LRN is read on-chain per address.
profile.addWalletDesc: To add another Stellar key, sign a login nonce for that key, then call the link action from the same session as this wallet.

debug.desc: Low-level interaction with indexed Soroban smart contracts.

courses.title: Choose a path and start with a focused first lesson.
courses.subtitle: Every LearnVault track is designed to move new learners from setup to hands-on progress with a clear first milestone.
courses.noCoursesDesc: There are no courses yet. Check back soon!
courses.noMatchDesc: Try a different search term or adjust the difficulty and track filters.
courses.searchPlaceholder: Search courses by title or description…

dashboard.connectDesc: To view your learning dashboard and on-chain reputation, please connect your Stellar wallet.
dashboard.subtitle: Your learning dashboard and on-chain reputation.
dashboard.noCourses: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet.

history.title: Activity History
history.connectDesc: Connect your wallet to view on-chain activity.
history.noTransactions: No transactions found for this wallet yet.

community.title: Community Events
community.subtitle: Join hackathons, study groups, and workshops to master the Stellar ecosystem.

treasury.title: Treasury Dashboard
treasury.subtitle: Real-time transparency into the LearnVault decentralized scholarship fund.
treasury.treasuryHealthDesc: Actual treasury inflows and outflows from recent on-chain activity.
treasury.scholarshipProgramDesc: Real-time health metrics for the active scholarship cohort.
treasury.noActivityDesc: No deposits or disbursements have been recorded yet. Check back soon for updates.
treasury.connectToVote: Connect your wallet to donate to the treasury
treasury.noHistoryDesc: Deposits and disbursements will appear here once on-chain treasury activity is available.

donor.title: Donor Dashboard
donor.subtitle: Fund scholars, earn governance power, and shape the future of decentralized education.
donor.connectDesc: Connect your Stellar wallet to view your contribution history, governance power, and funded scholars.
donor.connectHint: Use the Connect Wallet button in the top-right corner.
donor.depositSecurity: Deposits are secured on the Stellar blockchain
donor.fundScholars: Your funds support eligible scholar proposals
donor.noVotesYet: You haven't voted on any proposals yet.
donor.noVotesDesc: Once you gain governance power, you'll be able to vote on proposals that shape the future of LearnVault.
donor.helpDesc: Help us shape the future of decentralized education. Your contributions unlock governance voting power.
donor.noContributions: No contributions yet. Make your first deposit to support scholars.
donor.noScholarsDesc: Make a contribution above to enable approved scholarship proposals and directly impact scholars' lives.
donor.supportDesc: Join the LearnVault donor community. Your contributions fund scholarship proposals and earn you governance tokens to shape the future of decentralized education.
donor.fundScholarsDesc: Support approved scholarship proposals that change lives
donor.earnVotingDesc: Get governance tokens and vote on DAO decisions
donor.trackImpactDesc: See real-time progress of scholars you funded
donor.step1Desc: Use your wallet to deposit USDC to the scholarship treasury
donor.step2Desc: 1 USDC = 1 GOV token for voting and impact tracking
donor.step3Desc: Vote on proposals and watch your funded scholars succeed
donor.blockchainSecurity: 🔐 Your deposits are secured on the Stellar blockchain
donor.govDescription: Governance Token (GOV) — 1 GOV = 1 vote in DAO decisions

peerReview.title: Peer review queue
peerReview.subtitle: Your review is a signal for admins — it does not approve or reject milestones on its own. Completing a review earns LRN in your scholar balance.
peerReview.noItems: No submissions are available for you to review right now. You may already have reviewed them, be enrolled in the same course, or need a higher LRN balance to qualify.
peerReview.connectDesc: Connect your wallet to see milestone submissions you can review as an experienced scholar.

wiki.title: Knowledge Base
wiki.subtitle: Explore guides, tutorials, and deep-dives into Stellar, Soroban, and how to make the most of LearnVault.
wiki.noRelated: No other pages in this category.
wiki.helpDesc: Join our community Discord to chat with other scholars and developers.
wiki.pageNotFoundDesc: The wiki page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

notFound.message: This page doesn't exist — but your learning journey does.

admin.coursesDesc: Live course records from the backend course catalog.
admin.usersDesc: Lookup learner profiles by wallet address.
admin.wikiDesc: Create and edit platform documentation and guides.
admin.confirmAction: Are you sure you want to {{action}} this submission?
admin.scholarLookupDesc: Live scholar data from the backend profile endpoint.
admin.treasuryControlsDesc: Live scholarship treasury pause state and admin action.
admin.connectAdminWallet: Connect the admin wallet before submitting treasury actions.
admin.contractInfoDesc: Registry-backed contract IDs plus live state for admin-managed contracts.

credential.revokedDesc: This credential has been revoked by the issuer and is no longer valid.
credential.errorDesc: Something went wrong while fetching this credential. Please try again later.
credential.shareText: I've just earned my {{program}} credential on @LearnVault!

course.searchCourses: Search courses by title or description…

lesson.walletRequiredDesc: Please connect your wallet to access track content and track your learning milestones on-chain.
lesson.lessonLockedDesc: You must complete the previous lesson before starting this one.

forum.title: Discussion Forum
forum.noDiscussions: No discussions yet. Be the first to start a conversation about this course!
forum.deleteThreadConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this thread?
forum.deleteReplyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this reply?
forum.failedToLoad: Failed to load discussions. Please try again later.
forum.threadNotFound: Thread not found or failed to load.
forum.connectToReply: You must be connected to reply.

milestone.submissionReceivedDesc: Your milestone evidence has been submitted and is currently awaiting admin review. You'll be notified once it's verified.
milestone.milestoneVerifiedDesc: Congratulations! Your work has been reviewed and verified by the committee.
milestone.submitEvidenceDesc: Provide a GitHub repository link or a brief description of your work to complete this milestone.
milestone.workPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you built or achieved...

reportForm.title: Submit a milestone completion report
reportForm.desc: Send the validator committee the course, milestone, and evidence for the work you completed.
reportForm.milestoneNotesPlaceholder: Describe what you built, tested, or shipped for this milestone.
reportForm.certify: I certify that this submission accurately represents my completed work and supporting evidence for this milestone.

onboarding.title: Go from first visit to first course in minutes.

welcome.title: Learn Stellar, ship on-chain, earn as you grow.
welcome.desc: LearnVault helps new builders get a wallet ready, funded, enrolled, and into their first practical lesson without dropping them into blockchain setup confusion.

installWallet.title: Install Freighter to unlock the guided flow.
installWallet.desc: We check for Freighter first because it gives new learners the smoothest setup path for Stellar testnet and Soroban interactions.

connectWallet.title: Connect your wallet to continue.
connectWallet.desc: Once connected, we can verify your account, check for testnet balance, and prepare your first enrollment.
connectWallet.bypassNote: Bypass enabled, so any supported Stellar wallet is fine.

getFunds.titleTestnet: Fund your wallet for testnet actions.
getFunds.titleMainnet: Fund your wallet for Stellar mainnet.
getFunds.descTestnet: This step runs automatically when your XLM balance is zero, so new learners don't need to hunt for faucets.
getFunds.descMainnet: On Stellar mainnet, fund your account by purchasing XLM from an exchange or having someone send you at least 1 XLM. Once the account is activated, LearnVault can detect the balance and unlock the next step.
getFunds.publicNetworkNote: Public network wallets are not auto-funded. Add XLM to this wallet, then use the balance checker to confirm funding.
getFunds.checkingNote: Checking Horizon for new XLM every few seconds. Leave this step open and we'll detect funding as soon as it lands.

chooseTrack.title: Pick the beginner path that matches your goal.
chooseTrack.desc: Every track starts practical and low-friction, so your first lesson feels like momentum instead of theory overload.
chooseTrack.noTracks: No beginner tracks are available right now.

enroll.title: One click and you're enrolled.
enroll.desc: We use the existing contract flow here, so this step maps to the real enrollment path the product already supports.

startLearning.title: Your first lesson is ready.
startLearning.desc: We'll hand you off to the learn experience with your track preselected so you can start immediately.

sidebar.validationDesc: Each step is either completed automatically or gated until the required action is done.
sidebar.lowFrictionDesc: New users get funding help and returning users skip the wizard when prior wallet connection is already stored.
sidebar.professionalHandoffDesc: Track selection, enrollment, and lesson launch all reuse the existing app stack instead of inventing parallel logic.
sidebar.chooseTrackPrompt: Choose a track to personalize the next steps.

quiz.passed: Extraordinary! You've successfully cleared the verification process. Your reputation has increased.
quiz.failed: Verification failed. Review the technical manual and attempt again to secure your credentials.

errors.unexpectedError: The application encountered an unexpected error. Try refreshing the page — if the problem persists, contact support with the reference ID below.

scholarship.applyDesc: Submit a polished proposal to the DAO treasury with eligibility checks, milestone planning, and wallet-backed submission.

eligibility.title: Eligibility check
eligibility.desc: Your LRN balance is checked as soon as a wallet is connected. If a generated LearnToken client is available, the form reads the contract balance first and falls back to the wallet asset view otherwise.
eligibility.connectError: Connect your wallet to check LRN eligibility.
eligibility.checkingError: Wait for the LRN balance check to finish.
eligibility.insufficientError: You need {{amount}} more LRN to continue.

program.title: Program details
program.desc: Share where you want to study, what you plan to learn, and when the program begins.
program.name: Program or bootcamp name
program.descPlaceholder: Describe the skills you plan to build and how the scholarship changes your trajectory.

funding.title: Funding request
funding.desc: Break the request into three concrete milestones the DAO can review and track over time.
funding.milestoneDescPlaceholder: What will be delivered at this checkpoint?

reviewStep.title: Review & submit
reviewStep.desc: Review the proposal summary, confirm the connected wallet, and sign the transaction when prompted.
reviewStep.walletConfirm: I confirm that {{wallet}} should receive scholarship disbursements.

confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.desc: Your proposal has been recorded and linked back into the DAO view.
confirmation.noHash: No hash returned in fallback mode

comingSoon.building: This page is under construction. We're building something awesome for the LearnVault community!
